title: eria neoelata
intro: Eria neoelata, also known as the Neoelata Orchid or Himalayan Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Eria neoelata are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and enhancing immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, Eria neoelata is often used in tea, capsule, or tincture form, and is also used in combination with other herbs to create blends for specific health benefits.
